summary: BUG-014 — logout() now clears 11 user-state localStorage keys after supabase.auth.signOut() (progress, active_deck, deck_rewards_seen, login_reward_seen, daily.cardOfTheDay, share_payload, persisted_reading_session_keys, profile_revisit, session_id, _mt_profile_last_visit, selection). Prevents User A's streak/decks/active-choice leaking to User B on shared device. Device prefs (lang, card caches) preserved.

BUG-013 — deck-inventory.js mutual exclusion: active deck never dims and never shows lock badge regardless of streak. Two-line change: opacity guard widened to (unlocked || active), lock-badge conditional tightened to (!unlocked && !active). Preserves user's active deck choice through streak resets without auto-eviction.
